description: You are a BIM Coordinator performing a model review. First, load the IFC model located at `/home/ga/IFCModels/fzk_haus.ifc` into BlenderBIM. Navigate the 3D viewport to locate any door (`IfcDoor`) in the model and position your camera so the door is clearly visible. Next, use Bonsai's BCF (BIM Collaboration Format) tools to initialize a new local BCF project. Create a new BCF Topic (issue) for the door you are looking at. Set the topic Title to include the word 'Clearance' (e.g., 'Door Clearance Issue'). Set the 'Assigned To' field to exactly 'architect@example.com'. Add a descriptive Comment (e.g., 'Please widen to 900mm'). Capture the current 3D viewport as a Viewpoint for the topic (this should capture both the camera coordinates and a snapshot image). Finally, export/save the BCF project as an offline file to exactly: `/home/ga/BIMProjects/coordination_issues.bcfzip`.

metadata.pass_score_note: threshold=65, requires at least file creation, structure, title, and visual capture
